content.text:
Recent English-language posts on X about Mistral AI, Mistral models, ElevenLabs (aka 11 Labs AI), and Mistral API focus heavily on two big announcements from February 2026: Mistral AI's launch of Voxtral Transcribe 2 (next-gen speech-to-text models with low latency and diarization)[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019068826097213953)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019194260872942046)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019074879924899916) and ElevenLabs raising $500M at an $11B valuation to advance voice AI for agents and platforms.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019048384011854087)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019058569337868301)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2019080811916730746)

### Key Highlights on Mistral AI/Models/API:
- **Voxtral & New Models**: Mistral released ultra-fast translation and transcription models (e.g., Voxtral Transcribe 2), praised for on-premise use, speed, and EU focus. Users note it's competitive with big labs despite fewer GPUs.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019068826097213953)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019194260872942046)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019074879924899916)
- **Model Spotlights**: Discussions on fine-tunes like Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 (instruction-tuned for tasks) and Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407 (conversational AI).[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2019091086694899866)[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2018449382786695445)
- **Access & Strategy**: Free chat at chat.mistral.ai; praised as EU alternative to OpenAI (open-source, efficient models). Partnerships like OCP Group for AI transformation.[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2017544892948303896)[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2018325336908312875)[[11]](https://x.com/i/status/2019127407823974860)
- **Other**: Users transferring knowledge bases to Mistral from ChatGPT; new robotics/multimodal models rivaling OpenAI.[[12]](https://x.com/i/status/2018074039055532418)[[13]](https://x.com/i/status/2018614712020221983)

### Key Highlights on ElevenLabs:
- **Funding Buzz**: Massive $500M Series D at $11B valuation (led by Sequoia), with $300M+ ARR. Powers Meta, Epic, NVIDIA; expanding to speech-to-text, dubbing, agents. Giveaway drew thousands of "11B" comments.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019048384011854087)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019058569337868301)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2019080811916730746)[[14]](https://x.com/i/status/2019086302977913157)
- **Use Cases**: Free voice tech for stroke survivors (via Stroke Onward partnership); listed in top AI tools for creators (script-to-voice).[[15]](https://x.com/i/status/2018293399128887627)[[16]](https://x.com/i/status/2019045851625312385)
- **Creative**: Used in AI videos with RunwayML/Flux for storytelling.[[17]](https://x.com/i/status/2017797040516821294)

No direct mentions of "Mistral API" in top results, but Mistral's models are accessible via their platform/API. Activity peaked Feb 4, 2026—both companies are driving voice/AI infrastructure talks.[[18]](https://x.com/i/status/2018945728358305940)
